title: Budget 2024 information release - Ministry of Education
content:
Whakapuaki mōhiohio mō te Mahere Pūtea 2024

## Budget 2024 information release
The following Ministry of Education documents have been published as part of the Budget 2024 process.
The published information includes key Budget documents and decisions. Other advice provided to Ministers can be found on our Advice seen by ministers page.
Where information in these documents has not been released, the relevant Official Information Act 1982 grounds for withholding have been noted.
More Budget 2024 documents can be viewed on the Treasury's Budget 2024 site.
Budget 2024 – Treasury
More Budget 2024 information can be viewed on the website.
